offers.title: Seasonal Sri Lankan Spiced Coffee
offers.description: Estate-grown beans slow-brewed with cardamom, clove and a touch of jaggery — the way the hill country warms up on a misty morning.

offers.title: Weekend High Tea Platter for Two
offers.description: Love cake, butter cookies and short eats served with a pot of Uva tea — a proper pause for two, every Saturday and Sunday.

offers.title: Traveler's Express Breakfast Deal
offers.description: Milk toast, an egg roti and your choice of coffee or tea, plated fast for anyone still tackling the hairpin bends ahead.
